prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "5. Market for Registrant's Common Equity, Related Stockholder Matters and Issuer Purchases of Equity Securities" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 6. Reserved".
Find where Item 5 ends: right before the "Item 6" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 5 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
The Company issued warrants to purchase up to 331,236 shares of common stock to the placement agent of a registered direct offering on November
3, 2023. See “Part I – Item 1. Business – Recent Business Development – November 2023 Offering.”

The Company issued warrants to purchase up to 40,514 shares of common stock to the placement agent of a registered direct offering on March 26,
2024. See “Part I – Item 1. Business – Recent Business Development – March 2024 Offering.”
